chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 556 of 2024 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Applicant: Aqeel Ahmed Mahar s/o Rafique Ali Mahar Through Mr. Ghulam Mustafa Burdi, Advocate. Respondent No.1: SHO PS Sakrand, through Miss Safa Hisbani, A.P.G. Respondent No.2: Kirshan Kumar s/o Madan Das Lohana Through Mr. Abdul Aziz, Advocate. Respondents No.3: Shah Muhammad s/o Mir Ghulam Hyder Talpur. Nemo. Respondent No.4: Altaf Hussain s/o not known Mahar. Nemo. Date of hearing: 24.10.2025 Date of Order: 18.11.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J.: For reasons to be recorded the above-titled cr misc application is dismissed. JUDGE Tufail
